articles.title: IPL 2026: How every piece of the puzzle fell into place for RCB
articles.description: Every major RCB win in IPL 2026 featured a different hero. Sometimes it was Kohli. Sometimes Patidar. Sometimes Padikkal. Sometimes David. Sometimes Krunal. Sometimes Bhuvneshwar. Sometimes it was the bowlers operating as a collective unit. That was the defining characteristic of this championship side. The first IPL trophy ended one of the league's longest waits. The second confirmed something even more important. Royal Challengers Bengaluru are no longer a franchise chasing history. They may well be on their way to creating one.
articles.full_text: Every major RCB win in IPL 2026 featured a different hero. Sometimes it was Kohli. Sometimes Patidar. Sometimes Padikkal. Sometimes David. Sometimes Krunal. Sometimes Bhuvneshwar. The second confirmed something even more important. Royal Challengers Bengaluru are no longer a franchise chasing history. They may well be on their way to creating one.

articles.title: 'Sitting inside CBSE': Rahul's 'beware of pickpockets' warning amid OSM row
articles.description: Gandhi on Sunday stepped up his attack on Prime Minister Narendra Modi over the CBSE OSM controversy, accusing him of ignoring the concerns of 18.5 lakh students allegedly affected by irregularities in the board's answer-sheet scanning process. In a post on X, the leader of opposition in the Lok Sabha said the Prime Minister found time to speak on a range of issues during his monthly Mann Ki Baat address, but not about students whose answer sheets were allegedly not assessed properly.

articles.title: RCB's new era, Kohli's old magic: Defending champions outclass GT in IPL final
articles.description: Virat Kohli produced a masterful unbeaten 75 after Royal Challengers Bengaluru's (RCB) pace attack dismantled Gujarat Titans at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday. Rajat Patidar's men secured a second successive IPL title with a commanding five-wicket victory. Rajat Patidar also became only the third captain to have won back-to-back IPL titles after MS Dhoni and Rohit Sharma.
articles.full_text: Pratyush Raj is a cricket journalist with TOI Sports, specializing in all things cricket, both on and off the field. He began his career with the Business Standard before following his passion as a sports reporter for the Times of India in Chandigarh. Pratyush has also contributed to the sports coverage of India Today Group and his last stint was with The Indian Express. His love for sports was nurtured during his upbringing in flood-prone Saharsa, a district in North Bihar, where Cricket Samrat was his constant companion. Read More

articles.title: Full Bengal cabinet today: BJP balances old-versus-new, regional aspirations
articles.description: Bengal's BJP-led government is gearing up for an expansion of its ministerial council, aiming for a total of 35 members. This balanced approach will emphasize regional diversity, acknowledging both veteran party leaders and newcomers.
articles.full_text: Bengal's BJP-led government is gearing up for an expansion of its ministerial council, aiming for a total of 35 members. This balanced approach will emphasize regional diversity, acknowledging both veteran party leaders and newcomers.

articles.title: 'My son was so happy': Hours after saying 'I do', Indian-origin newlywed pilot killed in helicopter crash in US
articles.description: An Indian-origin pilot, Dave Fiji, tragically died in a helicopter crash just hours after his wedding in Georgia. The crash also claimed the life of the helicopter pilot, while his new bride, Jesni, survived and is recovering. Dave had expressed concerns about poor visibility before the flight, which was a special send-off after the ceremony.

articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: International gold prices slip on inflation concerns, rising crude prices & US-Iran talks uncertainty
articles.full_text: Gold prices edged lower on Monday as a firmer US dollar and a rise in crude oil prices reduced the appeal of the precious metal, while investors closely monitored developments surrounding a proposed extension of the Iran ceasefire agreement and awaited a decision from US President Donald Trump. Spot gold slipped 0.2% to $4,527.36 per ounce as of 0156 GMT, retreating after touching a two-week high in the previous session. US gold futures declined 0.8% to $4,558.10 an ounce. The strengthening dollar added pressure on bullion by making gold more expensive for buyers using other currencies.

articles.title: Oil prices today: Crude jumps over 2% after Israel intensifies attacks in Lebanon despite ceasefire
articles.description: Oil prices surged over 2% as Israel ordered troop deployments into southern Lebanon, escalating tensions with Hezbollah. This renewed fighting raises concerns for a US-Iran ceasefire extension and regional stability, impacting global energy supply outlooks. Mines in the Strait of Hormuz further complicate efforts to restore shipping traffic.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: KCET 2026 results expected shortly as KEA prepares UGCET scorecard release at karresults.nic.in
articles.description: KCET 2026 results: The Karnataka Examinations Authority (KEA) will soon release KCET 2026 results, with scorecards expected in the first week of June 2026 on official portals. The delay was due to rescheduled agricultural and veterinary practical exams, affecting over 24,250 candidates. Around 3.11 lakh students appeared for the exam held in April 2026. Results will include rank cards based on a 50:50 weightage of entrance exam and Class 12 marks, followed by counselling and seat allotment processes.

articles.title: Telangana TET 2026 schedule released, CBT to be held across 10 sessions
articles.description: TG TET 2026 schedule: The School Education Department has released the TG TET June 2026 schedule, confirming CBT exams from June 16 to June 22 across 10 sessions in Telangana. Conducted in two daily shifts, the test includes Paper I and Paper II covering Mathematics, Science, Social Studies and Minority Languages. A total of 1,36,418 candidates have applied. The notification issued under Rc.No. 222/TGTET-JUNE-2026/2026 confirms details are available on the SCERT website for candidate reference.

articles.title: DSSC recruitment 2026: 78 group C vacancies announced for MTS, LDC and technical posts; check details and direct link here
articles.description: DSSC Wellington has released its 2026 recruitment notification for 78 Group C civilian vacancies, inviting offline applications from May 23 to June 12, 2026. Posts include MTS, LDC, Stenographer, Drivers, and technical roles with pay levels from Level 1 to 5. Eligibility ranges from 10th pass to graduate qualifications. Selection will be through a written exam and skill test where applicable. Candidates must submit forms with documents and ?100 demand draft to Wellington, Tamil Nadu.

articles.title: AP EAMCET 2026 result out today at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in; here's how to check scorecards and admission ranks
articles.description: The AP EAMCET 2026 result is expected to be released today by JNTU Kakinada on the official website. Candidates can access their scorecards using their registration number and EAMCET hall ticket number. The university is also likely to publish the rank list, which will be used during counselling and seat allotment. Rankings will be based entirely on AP EAPCET marks, with a normalisation process applied to ensure fairness across examination shifts.

articles.title: Robbie Williams expands US presence with major new projects
articles.description: Robbie Williams, the beloved British pop star, is making waves as he aims for a breakthrough in the American music landscape. The Netflix docuseries, 'His Own Story,' has resonated with a younger demographic, sparking renewed interest in his artistry. Furthermore, the upcoming biopic 'Better Man' is set to illuminate his extraordinary life and career.

articles.title: 'Euphoria' Season 4: Will the hit series return after Season 3?
articles.description: After a lengthy hiatus, 'Euphoria' Season 3 has delivered a darker narrative, leaving fans questioning its future. Creator Sam Levinson and star Zendaya have hinted at Season 3 being the series' conclusion, though the finale is billed as a season ender, not a series finale. The season saw significant plot developments, including character deaths and new struggles.

articles.title: Virat dances the night away with Anushka - WATCH
articles.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru's IPL victory saw Virat Kohli and Anushka Sharma steal the show with their on-field and post-match celebrations. Videos captured the couple joyfully dancing together, with Anushka even recording Kohli's enthusiastic moves with teammates. The team's official handle thanked Anushka for her unwavering support throughout the tournament, highlighting their heartwarming moments.
